result.reason: To support importing connection files from Microsoft Remote Desktop Connection Manager v2.90 and newer versions, ensuring continued compatibility for users.
result.approach: Analyze the RDCMan v2.90+ file format changes, then update RemoteDesktopConnectionManagerDeserializer.cs to parse the new schema and any modified XML structure for connections and associated properties.
